title: [v8] Integer overflow leading to OOB/CHECK in icu_71::FormattedStringBuilder::prepareForInsertHelper
description_snippet:
**Steps to reproduce the problem:**   
1. I was tested in this version of asan-win32-release_x64-993200.  
2. run: d8.exe poc.js  
  
**Problem Description:**   
## Title  
  - CHECK failed in icu_71::FormattedStringBuilder::prepareForInsertHelper  
  
## Test environment  
  - Windows 10 x64  
  -
